issues.dedupeKey: preview-toolbar-csp
issues.problem: Vercel injects the Preview Toolbar feedback script, while the site CSP blocks it and logs a console error on every page.
issues.reproduction: Open any public Review route with a fresh console and observe the blocked vercel.live feedback script.

issues.dedupeKey: localization:/:Chinese selection persists only in browser storage; the URL cannot preserve or share the selected language.
issues.problem: Chinese selection persists only in browser storage; the URL cannot preserve or share the selected language.
issues.reproduction: Switch to Chinese, copy the URL, then open it in a fresh context.
